themes.name: High Brokerage Charges
themes.description: Users are complaining about the high brokerage charges and fees associated with using the Groww app, which is affecting their investment experience. Many users have mentioned that the charges are too high and are eating into their profits.

quotes.text: brokerage charges high , but app's ui and features are awesome

compared to other apps to much expensive brokerage charged.. be alert and note. even we take one lot also taken high brokerage charges..be safe all. if you earn 1000 grow app share 400. finally you traded for grow app not for you
